'''charofo''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Nouns|noun]] meaning "[[Wikt:pseudization|pseudization]] (auto-generated)". It has inherent '''female''' gender.

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| ch-r-f
|-
! Word class
| [[Noun]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:pseudization|pseudization]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Inherent gender
| female
|-
! Citation form
| charofo
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:chærefeth|chærefeth]] || [[word:chærefej|chærefej]] || [[word:chærefesh|chærefesh]] || [[word:chærefe|chærefe]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:charorofoth|charorofoth]] || [[word:charorofoj|charorofoj]] || [[word:charorofosh|charorofosh]] || [[word:charorofo|charorofo]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:charofoth|charofoth]] || [[word:charofoj|charofoj]] || [[word:charofosh|charofosh]] || [[word:charofo|charofo]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:charoffofth|charoffofth]] || [[word:charoffofj|charoffofj]] || [[word:charoffofsh|charoffofsh]] || [[word:charoffof|charoffof]]
|}

''16 forms generated.''

== Case paradigm ==
''Shown for female singular.''
{| class="wikitable"
! Case !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[Agent]] || [[word:charofotho|charofotho]] || [[word:charofojo|charofojo]] || [[word:charofosho|charofosho]] || [[word:charofoko|charofoko]]
|-
| [[Patient]] || [[word:charofoth|charofoth]] || [[word:charofoj|charofoj]] || [[word:charofosh|charofosh]] || [[word:charofo|charofo]]
|-
| [[Possessive]] || [[word:charofothol|charofothol]] || [[word:charofojol|charofojol]] || [[word:charofoshol|charofoshol]] || [[word:charofokol|charofokol]]
|-
| [[Instrumental]] || [[word:charofoothotho|charofoothotho]] || [[word:charofoojojo|charofoojojo]] || [[word:charofooshosho|charofooshosho]] || [[word:charofooko|charofooko]]
|-
| [[Dative]] || [[word:charofothon|charofothon]] || [[word:charofojon|charofojon]] || [[word:charofoshon|charofoshon]] || [[word:charofokon|charofokon]]
|-
| [[Speaker]] || [[word:charofothooro|charofothooro]] || [[word:charofojooro|charofojooro]] || [[word:charofoshooro|charofoshooro]] || [[word:charofokooro|charofokooro]]
|}

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki female nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
[[Category:Words c2e237e]]
{{wordpage|effa290}}
